title: RGNAU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Visiting Medical Consultant and Visiting Physiotherapist Posts
post_name: Visiting Medical Consultant and Visiting Physiotherapist
short_info: Candidates below 60 years (Medical Consultant) and below 50 years (Physiotherapist) who have MD/DNB in relevant specialization or Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) with minimum 5 years of experience are eligible to apply for these Visiting Medical Consultant and Visiting Physiotherapist vacancies. The online application process for RGNAU Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 07 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Visiting Medical Consultant: Maximum age limit is 60 years. Visiting Physiotherapist: Maximum age limit is 50 years.

qualification.details: Visiting Medical Consultant (Gynaecology & Obstetrics) MD (Doctor of Medicine) / DNB in Obstetrics & Gynaecology Valid medical council registration Minimum experience of 5 years working with Government Hospital / Organizations / reputed and recognised Private Hospital Visiting Medical Consultant (Paediatrician) MD (Doctor of Medicine) / DNB in Paediatrics Valid medical council registration Minimum experience of 5 years working with Government Hospital / Organizations / reputed and recognised Private Hospital Visiting Physiotherapist Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) Valid registration with the Indian Association of Physiotherapists (IAP) or relevant state councils Minimum experience of 05 years working with Government Hospital / Organizations / reputed and recognised Private Hospital

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 12,000/- per visit (Medical Consultant), Rs. 2,000/- per visit (Physiotherapist)
salary_details.visiting medical consultant (gynaecology: Rs. 12,000/- per visit of 2 hours duration
salary_details.visiting medical consultant (paediatrici: Rs. 12,000/- per visit of 2 hours duration
salary_details.visiting physiotherapist: Rs. 2,000/- per visit of 2 hours duration

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RGNAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RGNAU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RGNAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the RGNAU recruitment is 07 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Visiting Medical Consultant and Visiting Physiotherapist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced by RGNAU for the positions of Visiting Medical Consultant and Visiting Physiotherapist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of relevant experience is required for all the advertised posts, whether for Medical Consultants or Physiotherapists.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Visiting Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Visiting Medical Consultant positions is 60 years. Candidates must be below this age to be eligible.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for a Visiting Medical Consultant?
faq.answer: The salary for a Visiting Medical Consultant is Rs. 12,000/- per visit, with each visit lasting approximately 2 hours.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification for the Visiting Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Visiting Physiotherapist post, candidates must hold a Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) degree.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the RGNAU recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official RGNAU recruitment portal. The link is provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an application fee for RGNAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for these posts. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the RGNAU recruitment involves an initial application screening followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the Important Links section of this article for your reference and detailed information.
